pi_items.source: Code verification: setup_task.sh (line 12) removes file at this path, export_result.sh (line 12) checks this exact path, task.json description references ~/Documents/calendar_log.txt which expands to /home/ga/Documents/calendar_log.txt

Code verification: verifier.py (line 72) checks 'if line_count >= 3' which awards full points (30 points) only when at least 3 dates are present. This matches the metadata claim of min_dates_required: 3

privileged_info_summary: The task requires agents to complete the GCompris Calendar activity (a real educational software) and log at least 3 successfully found dates to /home/ga/Documents/calendar_log.txt in YYYY-MM-DD format. The verifier awards full points (40 points of 100 total) only when the log file contains 3 or more dated entries created during task execution. Additional points (60 of 100) are awarded through VLM verification of calendar navigation and success indicators in the trajectory screenshots.
